display_information.name: Access Coach
display_information.description: Slack agent for neurodivergent teammates — plain language, low-load thread digests, and alt text.

agent_view.agent_description: Built for neurodivergent, ESL, and screen-reader teammates: rewrite jargon, digest long threads for cognitive load, and add alt text — all inside Slack.

suggested_prompts.title: Plain language
suggested_prompts.message: Rewrite this for neurodivergent and ESL teammates — plain language, short sentences, explain acronyms.

suggested_prompts.title: Thread digest
suggested_prompts.message: Summarize this thread for low cognitive load: TL;DR, decisions, owners, next steps.

suggested_prompts.title: Alt text
suggested_prompts.message: Suggest accessible alt text for the image I shared so screen-reader users can follow.

shortcuts.name: Rewrite plain language
shortcuts.description: Rewrite this message in clear, plain language

shortcuts.name: Summarize thread
shortcuts.description: Digest this thread for decisions and next steps

shortcuts.name: Suggest alt text
shortcuts.description: Write screen-reader alt text for attached images
